title: JRose Collections Kids Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Superhero, Unicorn & Dinosaur Value Bags with 5 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Superhero, Unicorn & Dinosaur themes, each filled with exciting toys, stickers, puzzles, and creative activities.
🧩 5 Fun Surprises in Every Bag – Children will love opening each bag to discover unique games, crafts, small toys, and stickers for hours of fun.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Bring fun and imagination to life with this 3 Pack Kids Lucky Bag Set, featuring Superhero, Unicorn & Dinosaur themes. Each colourful bag contains 5 fun surprises, from toys and stickers to crafts and puzzles, making every bag unique and exciting. Every bag also includes a free themed activity sheet with engaging challenges like colouring pages, mazes, matching, tracing, and word searches – helping children learn and play at the same time. Perfect for party bags, school rewards, travel activities, or surprise gifts, these Lucky Bags combine fun, learning, and creativity. Safe, UKCA/CE certified, and suitable for children aged 3+. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
